title: Experience
description: Work experience across software, AI, products, and technology organizations

roles.name: Teleste
roles.description: I've driven AI product innovation from internal concept to implementation, and built and maintained production-grade C++ network services for broadband R&D products.

roles.name: Since AI
roles.description: I co-founded Since AI and lead its strategic partnerships and business development, building collaborations with global technology leaders and driving community engagement across the fast-moving AI ecosystem.

roles.name: Root
roles.description: I co-founded Root, Europe's premier recruiting event, connecting top talent with leading global technology companies.

roles.name: Kolt
roles.description: As a founding member, I help build Kolt's automation solutions for complex operational challenges, developing robust platforms across multiple technical domains for mission-critical applications.

roles.name: Attractor
roles.description: I co-founded Attractor, a technology consultancy building production-grade software, applied AI, and security-first systems, where I lead commercial work — client discovery, scoping, proposals, and partnerships — alongside hands-on AI implementation and solution architecture.
